import pytest
from myapp.db import get_session
from myapp.models import User


def test_create_user():
    session = get_session()
    user = User(name="testuser", email="test@example.com")
    session.add(user)
    session.commit()
    assert user.id is not None


def test_update_user_role():
    session = get_session()
    user = session.query(User).filter_by(name="testuser").first()
    user.role = "admin"
    session.commit()
    assert user.role == "admin"


def test_create_bulk_orders():
    session = get_session()
    for i in range(100):
        order = Order(user_id=1, amount=i * 10.0)
        session.add(order)
    session.commit()
    count = session.query(Order).count()
    assert count >= 100
